The PR adds a deterministic docs-map generator/checker, commits `docs/docs_map.md`, updates the Chinese glossary, and wires docs-map commands into `check:docs`.

PR surface: Docs +9788, Config +2, Other +200. Total +9990 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a runtime bug. Source inspection confirms current main and v2026.6.9 lack the docs-map artifact/generator, while the PR adds the requested generated map and check path.

target.title: docs: add generated docs map
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves
OpenClaw has a deep documentation tree, but no tracked single-file heading map that lets agents quickly see which page covers a concept before reading many files.
The existing docs list is metadata-oriented and does not provide the requested deterministic H1-H4 page outline or a stale-file check path.

Fixes #69442.

## Summary
- add a deterministic `scripts/generate-docs-map.mjs` generator/checker for public docs headings
- generate and commit `docs/docs_map.md` as the static heading map artifact
- wire `docs:map:gen` / `docs:map:check` into package scripts and include the stale-map check in `check:docs`

## Evidence
Validated locally from the PR branch:

```text
node scripts/generate-docs-map.mjs --check
docs:map: docs/docs_map.md is up to date.
node scripts/docs-list.js >/tmp/oc-69442-docs-list-postcommit.out
node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/docs_map.md
Docs MDX check passed (1 files, 1083ms).
git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD
```

`pnpm` package-script validation was not available in this local checkout because the environment does not currently have a working `pnpm` binary; the equivalent Node docs commands above were run directly.
